title: Populate pitcher_game_logs and bullpen_context in the canonical 2026 MLB foundation
objective: Complete the missing must-have entities in the canonical foundation by populating pitcher_game_logs and bullpen_context using the existing MLB Stats API source and the approved stats foundation spec, while preserving the corrected completed-season-to-date boundary.
paper_only_note: This remains paper-only / observation-mode rebuild work. No model implementation or strategy change is authorized from this task.
forbidden_actions: Broad repo sweep outside the backfill/hydration path
required_work: 1. Populate pitcher_game_logs in the canonical raw and normalized foundation paths where source data is available.
2. Derive and populate bullpen_context from the hydrated pitcher data where derivable.
3. Preserve the corrected completed-season-to-date boundary (through 2026-04-11 for this run).
4. Update manifest counts and source_unavailable annotations honestly for any remaining true gaps.
5. Do not alter unrelated entities or start updater logic.
acceptance_criteria: pitcher_game_logs is populated for completed season-to-date games where source data is available
bullpen_context is populated where derivable from source/hydrated pitcher data
coverage boundary remains completed season-to-date only
manifest counts reflect the corrected entity population
verification: State any remaining source-unavailable cases explicitly
